summary: Iteration 18: Backend testing for 3-month rolling RAG vectorization feature. All 10 tests passed (100%). Vector store is ready with 25,401 vectors (2,488 announcements + 22,913 PDF chunks). All guidance endpoints working correctly with retention_days=90.
passed_tests: GET /api/guidance/vectors/stats - returns ready=true, total_vectors=25401, announcements=2488, pdf_chunks=22913, retention_days=90
POST /api/guidance/vectors/rebuild - rebuilds vector store and returns updated stats
POST /api/guidance/prune - returns pruned count and retention_days=90
POST /api/guidance/ask (board meetings) - returns answer with filings_retrieved > 0 and sources list
GET /api/guidance/stats - includes retention_days=90 and vector_store stats
GET /api/guidance?limit=10 - returns items with pagination info
GET /api/guidance/stocks - returns stocks with announcements (663 total stocks)
test_credentials: No auth required for guidance endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - using existing guidance data (2,488 announcements from 663 stocks)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified the 3-month rolling RAG vectorization feature. Key findings: (1) Vector store builds on startup with 25,401 vectors (2,488 announcements + 22,913 PDF chunks). (2) TF-IDF vectorization with sklearn working correctly. (3) Cosine similarity search returns relevant results. (4) retention_days=90 enforced across all endpoints. (5) /api/guidance/ask endpoint uses GPT-4.1 via Emergent LLM key - takes 10-30s to respond. (6) Prune endpoint removes data older than 90 days. (7) All guidance endpoints properly filter by 3-month window.
